mapper.insert:
insert into notification (user_id, type, title, content, related_id, related_type, is_read, category, create_time, update_time) values
(#{item.userId}, #{item.type}, #{item.title}, #{item.content}, #{item.relatedId}, #{item.relatedType}, #{item.isRead}, #{item.category}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT n.id, f.user_id AS userId, u.nick_name AS nickName, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, f.product_id AS productId, p.title AS productTitle, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(p.images, '$[0]')) AS productImage, p.price AS productPrice, n.is_read AS isRead, n.create_time AS createTime FROM notification n JOIN favorite f ON f.id = n.related_id JOIN user u ON f.user_id = u.id JOIN product p ON f.product_id = p.id WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} AND n.type = 6 ORDER BY n.create_time DESC

SELECT n.id, f.follower_id AS userId, u.nick_name AS nickName, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, n.is_read AS isRead, n.create_time AS createTime, IF(f.follower_id IS NOT NULL, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow uf WHERE uf.follower_id = #{userId} AND uf.followee_id = f.follower_id) > 0, FALSE) AS isFollowing FROM notification n LEFT JOIN user_follow f ON f.id = n.related_id LEFT JOIN user u ON f.follower_id = u.id WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} AND n.type = 11 ORDER BY n.create_time DESC
